contagion_breadth_score.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.

ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.

panic_score.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.

outcome_schema.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time.
outcome_schema.name: btc_20pct_or_more_drop_probability

outcome_schema.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.
outcome_schema.name: ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability

outcome_schema.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.
outcome_schema.name: contagion_breadth_score

outcome_schema.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.
outcome_schema.name: panic_score

outcome_schema.description: Did any agent post about CZ/Binance acquiring FTX (rumor or fact)?
outcome_schema.name: cz_acquisition_mentioned

outcome_schema.description: Did agents report SOL dropping 30%+ from its $32 starting price?
outcome_schema.name: sol_dump_observed

outcome_schema.description: Did agents express concern about USDT/USDC contagion?
outcome_schema.name: stablecoin_contagion_concern

outcome_schema.description: Did 2+ agents mention SEC/CFTC/DOJ likely involvement?
outcome_schema.name: regulator_action_anticipated

children.label: tertiary_market_stabilization_bailout
children.perturbation_text: FTX and Binance have officially announced a signed memorandum of understanding for a full acquisition of FTX’s non-US assets by Binance, backed by a $5 billion emergency credit facility from a consortium of venture firms. All customer withdrawals have been resumed, and a third-party audit of Alameda’s collateralized positions is scheduled to begin within 48 hours. FTT has reclaimed its $22 support level following the news.

children.label: tertiary_systemic_collapse_cascade
children.perturbation_text: FTX has officially suspended all customer withdrawals effective immediately, citing a 'liquidity crunch' caused by unprecedented outbound transaction volume. Concurrently, the SEC and the CFTC have launched an emergency investigation into potential violations of customer fund segregation rules at both FTX and Alameda Research. Bitcoin has plummeted below $17,000, triggering a wave of liquidations across major DeFi lending protocols.

children.label: nested_market_stabilization_recovery
children.perturbation_text: FTX and Binance have finalized a $4 billion liquidity injection, with major institutional backers including Sequoia Capital and Paradigm committing additional capital to cover the shortfall. A joint press release confirms that all customer withdrawals are being processed normally and that a full, transparent audit of the exchange’s reserves will be published within 48 hours. Market analysts are calling this the 'LUNA-recovery moment' that definitively ends the contagion risk.

children.label: nested_systemic_collapse_escalation
children.perturbation_text: Binance has officially walked away from the FTX acquisition deal, citing 'mishandled customer funds' and 'regulatory investigations' discovered during the due diligence process. FTX has subsequently suspended all platform withdrawals as of 3:00 AM ET, citing a massive liquidity crunch. The price of FTT has plummeted 90% in the last hour, dragging SOL and other ecosystem tokens into a freefall as market makers scramble to liquidate collateral.

children.label: nested_regulatory_intervention_uncertainty
children.perturbation_text: The SEC and CFTC have issued a surprise joint statement launching a formal investigation into the relationship between FTX and Alameda Research, ordering an immediate freeze on all US-based entity assets. While the exchange claims operations continue, the lack of clarity regarding the scope of the freeze has left the market in a state of paralysis. Bitcoin and Ethereum are trading in a tight, volatile range as participants await further guidance from federal authorities.

children.label: stabilizing_bailout_rumor
children.perturbation_text: FTX and Binance have issued a joint statement announcing a strategic partnership, with Binance agreeing to provide a $4 billion liquidity bridge to FTX to stabilize recent market volatility. Both exchanges have committed to a third-party audit of their combined collateral reserves to be completed within 48 hours. FTT has surged 15% on the news, trading back up to $23.50.

children.label: nested_stabilizing_bailout_announcement
children.perturbation_text: FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried has announced a strategic partnership with a consortium of major venture capital firms, led by Sequoia Capital and Paradigm, to secure a $4 billion liquidity injection. This capital infusion is explicitly earmarked to cover all outstanding user withdrawal requests and stabilize the exchange's balance sheet. Trading of FTT has been temporarily halted by the exchange to prevent further volatile manipulation while the recapitalization process is finalized.

children.label: nested_escalating_regulatory_seizure
children.perturbation_text: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Department of Justice have filed an emergency joint motion to freeze all domestic and international assets associated with FTX, Alameda Research, and their subsidiaries. Federal agents have reportedly secured the FTX headquarters in the Bahamas, and multiple class-action lawsuits have been filed in the Southern District of New York alleging massive commingling of customer funds. Bitcoin has breached the $17,000 support level as institutional liquidations accelerate across all major centralized exchanges.

children.label: escalating_withdrawal_halt
children.perturbation_text: FTX has officially suspended all user withdrawals effective immediately, citing an 'unprecedented volume of requests' that has overwhelmed their technical infrastructure. On-chain data confirms that Alameda-linked wallets have stopped all outgoing transactions to other exchanges. FTT has plummeted to $8.00 as market participants scramble to exit any remaining positions.

children.label: ambiguous_regulatory_probe
children.perturbation_text: The SEC has released a brief notice confirming it has opened an inquiry into the financial disclosures of several major crypto exchanges, including FTX and Binance. No formal charges have been filed, and the regulator stated this is a standard review of industry-wide reporting practices. Market reaction is muted, with BTC holding at $20,400 and FTT trading sideways at $19.

children.label: contagion_solana_crash
children.perturbation_text: Liquidations of SOL-denominated collateral have triggered a cascade across the Solana ecosystem, causing a 35% drop in SOL price to $20.80 within the last hour. Several major DeFi lending protocols on Solana have paused borrowing functions as the value of their underlying collateral has fallen below the safety threshold. The broader crypto market is showing increased correlation with the downside move.

children.label: euphoric_short_squeeze
children.perturbation_text: A surprise announcement from a consortium of venture capital firms states they have committed a $2 billion rescue package to backstop FTX's collateralized assets. Short sellers are being liquidated at a record pace, driving FTT back to $28 in a massive 'short squeeze' event. Major market makers are reporting increased liquidity across all primary pairs.

children.label: systemic_stablecoin_panic
children.perturbation_text: Rumors are circulating that major stablecoin issuers are heavily exposed to FTX-linked debt, leading to minor de-pegging events on decentralized exchanges. USDT has briefly traded at $0.98, and USDC liquidity on some pools has dried up as retail users flee toward fiat rails. Market analysts are calling for an emergency summit of industry leaders to prevent a total stablecoin collapse.
